mapper.insert: insert into order_list (order_id, data_id, identifier) values (#{orderId}, #{dataId}, #{identifier})

insert into order_info (order_id, order_name, data_use, create_time, user_id, real_name, file_num, file_size, order_state, state, order_reason, download_path,message_status) values (#{orderId}, #{orderName}, #{dataUse}, now(), #{userId}, #{realName}, #{fileNum}, #{fileSize}, 1, 0, '', '','0')
mapper.select: select cl.data_id,cl.query_time,cl.data_type, mi.table_name, menu_name, mi.menu_id, mi.table_column from (select oi.file_size, ol.data_id, ol.identifier,ol.query_time,ol.data_type from order_info oi left join order_list ol ON (ol.order_id = #{orderId} and oi.order_id = ol.order_id)) cl inner join shopping_menu_info mi on cl.identifier = mi.menu_id
select username from sys_user
SELECT order_id FROM `order_info` where user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into order_list (order_id, data_id, identifier,data_type) values
(#{item.orderId},#{item.dataId},#{item.identifier},#{item.dataType})

INSERT INTO order_file_info (id, create_time, update_time, file_path, file_name, file_size, save_day,sys_category_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{saveDay},#{sysCategoryId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, create_time, update_time, file_path, file_name, file_size, save_day FROM order_file_info WHERE file_path = #{filePath} limit 1

select source_file_id from htht_dms_sate_data_file_info where data_id in
#{id}

select di.*, dfi.thumbnail_file_url as png_url, dfi.thumbnail_file_name as file_name, cl.source_file_size, cl.file_name as data_name from htht_dms_sate_data_info as di inner join htht_dms_sate_data_file_info dfi inner join (select dtf.id as source_file_id, dtf.file_name, dtf.file_size as source_file_size from htht_dms_sate_data_task_file dtf where dtf.id in ( select source_file_id from htht_dms_sate_data_file_info where data_id = #{sourceFileId}) ) cl on di.id = dfi.data_id and dfi.source_file_id = cl.source_file_id

select pfi.id as sub_data, pi.cycle, pi.name, pi.issue, pi.mark, pi.product_path, pi.region_id, pi.satellite, pi.resolution, pfi.file_type, pfi.relative_path, pfi.file_name, pfi.file_size, qri.fullname from htht_cluster_schedule_product_info as pi inner join htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info as pfi inner join htht_region_info as qri on pi.id = pfi.product_info_id and pi.region_id = qri.regionid where pi.id = #{dataId}

SELECT tti.thematic_file_id,tti.issue,tti.file_size FROM htht_thematic_data_file_info dfi inner join htht_thematic_tif_info tti on dfi.id = tti.thematic_file_id where 1 = 1 and dfi.id in
#{dataId}

SELECT dfi.cycle,dfi.mark,tti.file_name,tti.issue,tti.file_type,tti.file_size FROM htht_thematic_data_file_info dfi inner join htht_thematic_tif_info tti on dfi.id = tti.thematic_file_id where dfi.id = #{dataId}

insert into order_list (order_id, data_id, identifier,query_time) values
(#{item.orderId},#{item.dataId},#{item.identifier},#{item.queryTime})

SELECT d.id as d_id, d.file_name as d_file_name, d.space_resolution, d.time_resolution, d.file_size as d_file_size, d.data_type, d.file_type as d_file_type, f.id as f_id, f.file_type as f_file_type, f.file_size as f_file_size, f.file_url, f.file_name as f_file_name FROM `htht_satellite_thematic_data_info` as d ,htht_satellite_thematic_data_file_info as f where d.id=f.data_id and d.id =#{dataId} and f.version='0'
SELECT sf.FUN_CODE FROM sys_fun sf LEFT JOIN sys_role_fun srf ON sf.FUN_ID = srf.FUN_ID LEFT JOIN `sys_role_user` sru ON sru.ROLE_ID = srf.ROLE_ID WHERE sru.USER_ID = #{userId} AND sf.FUN_TYPE = 0
SELECT ROLE_ID FROM `sys_role_user` where USER_ID = #{userId}
